movie.actors: Brian Robbins, Bill Calvert, Tricia Leigh Fisher, Gerrit Graham
movie.plot: A couple of teenagers break into a secret government science lab and steal a frozen corpse for a high school prank and accidentally awaken the corpse which turns out to be a CHUD, ironically named Bud, who goes on a killing spree and making his victims also cannibalistic CHUD's and its up to the teens to stop him.
movie.title: C.H.U.D. II: Bud the Chud
